query: Discover 600 red stars in the region of the Large Magellanic Cloud.

execution.adql: SELECT TOP 600 source_id, ra, dec, teff_gspphot, logg_gspphot, bp_rp, phot_g_mean_mag, pmra, pmdec FROM gaiadr3.gaia_source WHERE 1=CONTAINS(POINT('ICRS', ra, dec), CIRCLE('ICRS', 80.9, -69.8, 2.0)) AND teff_gspphot IS NOT NULL AND logg_gspphot IS NOT NULL AND teff_gspphot BETWEEN 2400 AND 3900 ORDER BY random_index
